mapper.select: SELECT id, contract_id as contractId, type, name, phone, delete_flag as deleteFlag FROM jsh_contract_person WHERE contract_id = #{contractId} AND ifnull(delete_flag,'0') != '1' ORDER BY id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jsh_contract_person (contract_id, type, name, phone, delete_flag) VALUES
(#{contractId}, #{p.type}, #{p.name}, #{p.phone}, '0')
mapper.update: UPDATE jsh_contract_person SET delete_flag = '1' WHERE contract_id = #{contractId}
